Game Clips

Xbox Live enables titles to share data between publishers and players. It also allows players to share data with other players. One particular application of this capability is game clips. With game clips, publishers and players can share data that relates to statistically measured performance within a game. The following topics provide an overview of what game clips are used for and how they are used.

  • What are Game Clips?
  • Designing Game Clips
  • Uploading Game Clips
  • Downloading Game Clips
